pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It’s a bit overwhelming in here with everyone waiting for the prize pool, isn't it? What's your plan if you manage to take some of it home?
Hey A, I’m I. It definitely is a lot to take in. If I win, that money is going straight to my family to help them out. What about you, what brings you here?
Same here, honestly. I’m just really determined to bring something home to help out my loved ones and get us on more solid ground.
I respect that. It’s good to know I'm not the only one here with that kind of motivation.
For sure. It keeps you focused when things get competitive. How many people are you looking out for back home?
Mainly my parents and my younger sister. They've been through a lot lately, so I'm really doing this for them. How big is the group you're supporting?
It's mainly my parents and my two younger brothers; we've all been struggling to keep our heads above water lately.
I hear you. It's hard seeing family struggle, but hopefully this game changes things for both of us.
I really hope so too. It’s a lot of pressure, but knowing who it’s for is what keeps me going.
I get that completely. Let's just do our best and hope things work out for our families. Good luck, A.
Thanks, I. Good luck to you and your family as well—I really hope we both come out on top for them.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share.
Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
It was a pleasure working with you. I'm glad we reached a fair outcome for everyone.
